Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. The Longing (1999) 22 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. QGIS 4.0 74 upvotes, 11 comments
  3. Galileo's handwritten notes found in ancient astronomy text 143 upvotes, 27 comments
  4. Entomologists use a particle accelerator to image ants at scale 130 upvotes, 24 comments
  5. Querying 3B Vectors 53 upvotes, 7 comments
  6. CT Scans of Health Wearables 220 upvotes, 47 comments
  7. Sarvam 105B, the first competitive Indian open source LLM 64 upvotes, 10 comments
  8. Hardening Firefox with Anthropic's Red Team 575 upvotes, 156 comments
  9. Plasma Bigscreen – 10-foot interface for KDE plasma 453 upvotes, 133 comments
  10. Editing changes in patch format with Jujutsu 31 upvotes, 5 comments
  11. this css proves me human 276 upvotes, 91 comments
  12. Lock Scroll with a Vengeance 17 upvotes, 2 comments
  13. Helix: A post-modern text editor 165 upvotes, 68 comments
  14. A tool that removes censorship from open-weight LLMs 175 upvotes, 78 comments
  15. Show HN: Moongate – Ultima Online server emulator in .NET 10 with Lua scripting 258 upvotes, 141 comments
  16. Working and Communicating with Japanese Engineers 40 upvotes, 15 comments
  17. UUID package coming to Go standard library 216 upvotes, 118 comments
  18. Tech employment now significantly worse than the 2008 or 2020 recessions 906 upvotes, 601 comments
  19. Uploading Pirated Books via BitTorrent Qualifies as Fair Use, Meta Argues 40 upvotes, 17 comments
  20. Show HN: Kula – Lightweight, self-contained Linux server monitoring tool 60 upvotes, 31 comments
  21. Tell HN: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has re-ignited a passion 499 upvotes, 359 comments
  22. Maybe there's a pattern here? 132 upvotes, 84 comments
  23. What canceled my Go context? 65 upvotes, 39 comments
  24. LLMs work best when the user defines their acceptance criteria first 246 upvotes, 184 comments
  25. C# strings silently kill your SQL Server indexes in Dapper 106 upvotes, 80 comments
  26. From Fargo to Zebra 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  27. Modernizing swapping: virtual swap spaces 30 upvotes, 24 comments
  28. My application programmer instincts failed when debugging assembler 13 upvotes, 10 comments
  29. Launch HN: Palus Finance (YC W26): Better yields on idle cash for startups, SMBs 53 upvotes, 77 comments
  30. Show HN: Tanstaafl – Pay-to-inbox email on Bitcoin Lightning 18 upvotes, 21 comments

Last generated 7:30pm, 7 March 2026. Source here.
